name: Black Lung Claims for Utah Miners Near Centerville

mainEntity.name: Is black lung disease compensable for coal miners near Centerville?
mainEntity.text: Is black lung disease compensable for coal miners near Centerville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, federal Black Lung Benefits Act covers miners with 1+ year coal dust exposure; Utah comp supplements for total disability.

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville proximity to historic mines qualifies. X-rays, PFTs prove pneumoconiosis. DOL pays 66⅔% wages lifetime. State offsets apply. 70% approval with attorney.

description: Yes, federal Black Lung Benefits Act covers miners with 1+ year coal dust exposure; Utah comp supplements for total disability.
